programmes.show_description: Tá sé ina shamhradh agus tá Cuan Bhaile Átha Cliath faoi bhláth. (Dublin Bay blossoms in the summer and its inhabitants make the most of the good weather.)
Súil siar ar obair na seirbhísí tarrthála agus na cúiseanna a ndéanann daoine an obair seo go deonach. (We look back on the work of the Rescue Services across the country.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Sa Lochán Beag, atá cúig mhíle dhéag siar ó chathair na Gaillimhe, a bheidh Síle. (15 miles west of Galway city lies the townland of An Lochán Beag.)
Babhta Ceannais Ghlór Tíre 2026 beo! Á chur i láthair ag Aoife Ní Thuairisg. (The live Final of Glór Tíre 2026! Presented by Aoife Ní Thuairisg.)
Scéal grá Eleanor Butler & Sarah Ponsonby a bhí meáite ar a bheith le chéile. (An enchanting tale that defied the conventions of the 18th century.)
Clár cúrsaí reatha seachtainiúil TG4. Déanfar scagadh agus plé ar scéalta nuachta. (Politics and the economy, regional, national and international affairs.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Is í Síle Ní Chonghaile a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Síle Ní Chonghaile.)
Beidh deich mbus bheaga ag comhaireamh inniu! (Ten little buses learn to count!)
Cé go mbíonn Emmy agus Mimi ina gcónaí le chéile níl cosúlacht ar bith acu le chéile. (Emmy and Mimi may live together, but they are about as different as can be.)
Caithfidh na Dathanna iad féin a eagrú ar roth mór inniu! (Today, the Colours have to organise themselves on a big wheel!)
Bíonn ar Cory dul chuig an dochtúir díreach roimh an gcluiche mór. (It's the day of the big match, but Cory has to make a last minute trip to the doctor.)
Tá fiacail scaoilte ag Babaí Trucail agus cuirtear an gas mícheart i mboinn Max. (Baby has a wobbly tooth, and Max's tyres are filled with the wrong gas.)
Ag foghlaim faoi ghlasraí a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo learns all about vegetables today.)
Tá Jamila agus Posy sa tóir ar thaisce i gcluiche nua atá acu. (Posy and Jamila's imaginations take a rainbow treasure hunt game in a direction that Pip doesn't expect.)
Tá Bobble ag fanacht tigh Deeno anocht ach tá sé ag cloisteáil torann aisteach atá ag cur faitís air. (Nighttime sounds are scaring Bobble at Deeno's sleepover.)
Déantar puisín de Catboy. (Catboy gets turned into a kittycat.)
Foghlaimíonn Wussywat faoi chothromaíocht agus í ag spraoi. (Wussywat tries her hand at pogoing, hula hooping and skipping but can't stay balanced.)
Cuirfidh Emily Eilís agus Jeaic eolas ar chineálacha éagsúla damhsa. (Emily Elizabeth and Jack learn about all the different dances.)
Tá sé ag cur isteach ar Woozle go bhfuil Pip ag iarraidh a bheith ina cat. (Woozle is jealous when Pip decides that she would like to be a cat!)
Tá Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex ar thóir greim le hithe. (Ginger joins the baby Pea-Rexes on their expedition to find dinner.)
Táthar chun cró madraí nua a dhéanamh do Scratch. (Scratch is going to get a new dog house built for him.)
Caithfidh chuile dhuine i nGairdín na Gréine dul chuig an dochtúir, seachas Bean Berg. (Everyone in Sunshine Gardens is really well but they all need to visit the doctor.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Bíonn Lola i gcónaí ag iarraidh a bheith cabhrach ach milleann sí obair scoile Charlie. (Lola tries to be helpful all the time, but she ends up ruining Charlie's schoolwork.)
Tá na Petronix ag iarraidh sionnach óg a chur ar ais sa bhfiántas. (The Petronix Defenders try to return a little fox pup back to the wild.)
Féachann na Guanos bábóg vúdú a bhfuil cosúlacht aige le Pat a úsáid le Caipín a ghabháil. (The Guanos try to use a voodoo doll to capture Caipín.)
Tá Angelo ag ceapadh go gcabhródh sé le Seanóir filleadh ar an scoil. (Angelo hopes to cheer up a lonely Geezer by re-enrolling him in school.)
Tá Learaí ag iarraidh a thaispeáint chomh dána is atá Dónall. (Peter plans to reveal just how horrid Henry really is.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi mheangadh sásta a bheith ar d'éadan. (A fun song about a happy face.)
Caithfidh na Blocuimhreacha teacht ar Phálás na bPátrún. (One and chums carefully cross the pattern puzzle paths over the magic moats to get to the Pattern Palace.)
Faigheann na Dathanna amach go gciallaíonn Glas stop! (The Colours find out that Green means stop!)
Teastaíonn planda pota nua do Bhuaf don taispeántas bláthanna ó tharla gur thit an chéad cheann uaidh! (Toad drops his potted plant, and he needs another one for the flower show!)
Nuair a chloiseann Pompon Josie ag cumadh ceoil tugann sé ugach dó féin tabhairt faoi rud éigin nua. (Pompon is inspired by Josie's improvised musical composition.)
Féachfaidh Seán le doras a bhíonn ag díoscán a dheisiú. (Today, Seán tries to repair a squeaky door.)
Itheann Pip agus Posy cácaí Frankie i ngan fhios di. (Pip and Posy give in to temptation and eat Frankie's cakes without her knowing.)
Déanann Máire Treasa masc leipreacháin & neart eile do Lá Fhéile Pádraig. (It's St. Patrick's day and Máire Treasa makes a leprechaun mask, draws St. Patrick & makes a clover.)
Tá taisce mhistéireach curtha sa ghairdín. (There is a mysterious treasure buried in the garden.)
Tá Dot chun gach rud a dheisiú. (Dot is going to fix everything.)
Samhlaíonn Sonaí a shaol ina dhéantóir trealamh spóirt nuair a bheidh sé mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Sonaí imagines his life as a sports equipment maker when he grows up.)
Socraíonn Zou go bhfuil sé chun rud ar bith atá briste sa teach a dheisiú. (Zou decides to repair all the broken things for the household today.)
Ar chlár an lae inniu, beidh madra ag spraoi sa sneachta agus cocaitíl ar aiste bia nua. (On today's programme, we have a dog's first snow day and a cockatiel's new diet.)
An taidhleoir, Pádraig Ó Bradáin a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín an tseachtain seo. (The diplomat Pádraig Ó Bradáin is Máirtín's guest this week.)
Faigheann Reese amach go bhfuil bua na cócaireachta aige. (Reese discovers a talent for cooking.)
Iarrann Carla ar Sam dul in éineacht léi chuig bainis a iarfhear céile. (Carla asks Sam to come along and play her passionate lover at her ex-husband's wedding.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Duine atá dúnmharaithe a bhíonn roimh Jessica nuair a théann sí chun seic a bhailiú do charthanacht. (Jessica arrives at an ice cream company to get a check for charity.)
Babhta Ceannais Ghlór Tíre 2026 beo! Á chur i láthair ag Aoife Ní Thuairisg. (The live Final of Glór Tíre 2026! Presented by Aoife Ní Thuairisg.)
Tugann an staraí Paul Murton aghaidh ar Inse Shealtainn agus Inse Orc sa gclár seo. (Historian Paul Murton travels to the Northern Isles.)
Clár ceoil tíre á chur i láthair ag Jo Ní Chéide. (Country music videos filmed on location in Ireland and presented by Jo Ní Chéide.)
Tá a hárasán in Sydney díolta ag Christine agus tá rún aici bogadh amach faoin tuath. (Christine has sold her two-bedroom apartment in Sydney and decided to head to the bush.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Clár nuachta do dhaoine óga ina gclúdaítear scéalta áitiúla, náisiúnta agus idirnáisiúnta. (News programme for young people covering local, national and international news.)
Feictear mar a thagann ainmhithe dúchasacha na hEorpa trí stoirm mhór sa samhradh. (We witness how the native animals come through a heavy summer storm in Central Europe.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Tugann an fidléir Doireann Ní Ghlacáin aghaidh ar Thír Eoghain chun blaiseadh de cheol na háite a fháil.(Doireann Ní Ghlacáin visits Tyrone, discovering its rich musical heritage.)
Is ag Seó Chaisleán Uidhilín i gContae an Dúin a bheifear sa gclár seo. (This week we're at the Castlewellan Show in County Down.)
Iarrann Carla ar Sam dul in éineacht léi chuig bainis a iarfhear céile. (Carla asks Sam to come along and play her passionate lover at her ex-husband's wedding.)
Clár faisnéise ina mbreathnaítear ar an tionchar a bhí ag an gcóras breithiúnach in Éirinn ar mhná na tíre. (Documentary series that examines the impact of Irish law on women.)
Tagann an fhírinne chun solais sa gcúirt agus bíonn deireadh leis an gcur i gcéill. (A shocking courtroom showdown finally exposes the truth and everyone's true colours.)
Ní mór do hiarrthóirí páirtí a roghnú go cúramach agus iad ag tabhairt faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (Castaways must split themselves into pairs for the immunity challenge.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Ar an 3 Meán Fómhair 1983, sádh Josie Joyce, baitsiléir a bhí 69 bliain d'aois. (On September 3rd 1983, 69 year old bachelor Josie Joyce was stabbed to death.)
Súil siar ar athimirt Chluiche Ceannais Iomána 2013 idir an Clár agus Corcaigh. (Highlights from Clare v Cork in the 2013 All-Ireland Hurling Final Replay.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)

Tugann an triúir cuairt ar Chathair Marrakech sa gclár seo. (The gang hop on a train to the captivating city of Marrakech.)

D'fhéadfadh Clúmh an lá a chaitheamh ag spraoi. (Fluff can happily play all day.)
Beidh na Singaling ag faire ar spéir na hoíche. (Join the Singalings as they look up to the night sky.)
Tá scátaí gach duine goidte ag Cailleach an tSeaca. (The Ice Witch snatches everyone's ice skates.)
Caithfidh Abby agus Rudy lón a réiteach do na gasúir ar fad ar scoil. (Abby and Rudy are at school, their job is to cook lunch for all the kids at school.)
Tá Posy ag iarraidh a chur ina luí ar Phip bréagán a mhalartú ach ní mó ná sásta a bhíonn sí ar deireadh. (Posy persuades Pip to swap toys for keeps in Swapsies.)
Tugann na hOlobabanna cuireadh do gach duine chuig cóisir mhór Gurdy. (The Olobobs invite everyone to Gurdy's 'lots-of-birthdays' birthday, with the help of Noisy Bean.)
Caithfidh Gekko an chathair a thabhairt slán ó Rocochtapas, róbat nua Romeo! (Gekko must save the city from Roboctopus, Romeo's new robot!)
Téann Wussywat ar thóir feithidí sa ngairdín. (Wussywat is on a bug hunt.)
Taitníonn go leor uirlisí ceoil le Zou. Féachann sé le hiad uilig a sheinm ag an am céanna! (Zou enjoys trying out many different musical instruments today.)
Tá cumhachtaí speisialta ag Cráca inniu mar gheall ar an éiclips. (Kracken has special powers today due to the eclipse.)
Tá Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex ag múineadh do Bhokchoydachtalach óg le heitilt. (Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes must teach a lost baby BokChoydactyl how to fly.)
Níl Hal ag iarraidh a cheamara a thabhairt ar iasacht do Dot. (Hal is reluctant to lend Dot his camera.)
Cuireann an tUasal Jackson caoi ar a sheanmheaisín reathaíochta le go mbeidh sé aclaí. (Mr Jackson repairs his old running machine in order to exercise and keep fit.)

Faigheann Lola agus a cara Lotta amach faoi iontaisí. (Lola and her best friend Lotta find out about fossils.)
Faigheann Pinocchio hata Leipreacháin ar iasacht. (Pinocchio borrows a Leprechaun's magic hat.)
Déantar máistir cung fú de Pompom agus caithfidh Pat stad a chur leis sula scriosfaidh sé gach rud faoin spéir. (Pat has to stop Pompom before he destroys everything in sight.)
Tá Angelo ag iarraidh a bheith i 'Leabhar na gCuriarrachtaí Domhanda'. (Angelo vows to get his name in the "Worlds' Book of World Records".)
Éiríonn Dónall i lár na hoíche le bheith ina fhear bainne in éineacht le Gearóid. (Henry gets up in the middle of the night to deliver milk with Paul.)

Amhrán spraíúil faoi dhul ag siúl sa gcoill. (A fun song about walking in the forest.)
Castar an t-arracht 'Bolg Mór' ar na Blocuimhreacha. (A big hairy monster with a big hairy tummy who loves puzzles? Find out who is in Big Tum's tum!)
Cuireann an Caimileon an dallamullóg ar na Dathanna. (The Chameleon plays tricks on the Colours.)
Buaileann Gabh agus Stop le hArís agus canann sé amhrán dóibh. (Go and Stop meet new friend, Again, who introduces himself in a song.)
Beidh an coimeádaí zú John ag tabhairt aire d'ainmhithe ón Afraic inniu. (Today, John the zookeeper prepares a feast for a variety of animals from Africa.)
Piocann Pip Zac ar a fhoireann in áit Posy agus níl Posy sásta! (When Pip picks Zac to be in his team for the wheelbarrow race Posy is upset.)
Lá na nAmadán atá ann agus tá Ribín ag iarraidh cleas a imirt ar a cuid cairde. (It's April Fool's Day and Ribín and Glibín want to play a trick on her friends.)
Amhráin faoi na Gealáin Thuaidh atá le cumadh ag daltaí Scoil Phádraig i nGaoth Dobhair inniu. (Music show for children with new songs in Irish.)
Tá George ag iarraidh an hata buí atá glanta ag na glantóirí a thaispeáint do Chompás an colúr. (George want to show the clean yellow hat to Compass the pigeon!)
Samhlaíonn Muireann a saol ina láithreoir raidió nuair a bheidh sí mór. (Muireann imagines her life as a radio presenter with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Téann Zou agus Zak go dtí an pháirc chun cluiche peile a imirt. (Zou and Zak go to the park to play a game of football.)
Ar chlár an lae inniu, beidh madra ar thuras agus moncaí ag spraoi san uisce. (On today's programme, we have a bulldog going for a spin and a duck starts a new diet.)
Róisín Uí Chualáin a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín an tseachtain seo. (Máirtín Tom Sheáinín is joined by Róisín Uí Chualáin from Inis Oírr.)
Tugann Malcolm cúnamh do Reese le hobair scoile. (Malcolm tries to help Reese bring his grades up.)
